speaker.tagline: Tech Community Lead | Speaker | Strategic Manager
speaker.bio:
Since 2020 Brandon has been actively engaging with and speaking to the developer community on tech and non-tech related issues. Having presented to mixed and diverse audiences , Brandon delivers electrifying talks that aim to inspire , inform and engage audiences. His talks has  ranged from physical and online workshop sessions to panels and keynotes. Some of the events he has been part of include DevFest Harare (Zimbabwe) , DevFest Kitwe and DevFest Lusaka (Zambia) and  , BuildwithAI Bonny Island (Nigeria ), Mozilla Festival Zambia , PyCon Zimbabwe and PyCon Africa (South Africa).

As a community lead and builder , Brandon has contributed to the revitalisation of Google Developer Groups Harare , spreading and mentoring student tech communities through Applied Machine Learning Days Africa , Zindi and he previously served as a Microsoft Learn Student Ambassador and a vice-president for Students for Exploration and Development of Space Midlands State University.

sessions.title: Build WITH AI , Build with AI , BuildwithAI : Google Toolkit to utilising AI in different scenarios
sessions.description:
No you can't just build. You don't just get a lightbulb moment and start clattering on your keyboard expecting AI to work magic until you have a product.

This talk will explore 3 key definitions of Build with AI.

1. Building stuff making use of AI to do the heavy lifting - Using tools like Firebase Studio , Gemini Code Assist and even Opal to create MVPs and prototypes. 

2. Using AI in an intentional and structured manner to build stuff. Using unlikely tools like Gemini Deep Research you can scrap the internet for problem research , project documentation , product design and so forth. I would add on tools like Stich for UI/UX designs and how to even use other tools out of the Google Ecosystem to finish the job ( I love Gemini but Kiro and Claude have shown to be exceptional to me)

3. Incorporating AI in the solutions that you are building. Ranging from AI Studio to Gemma to Vertex AI. Google offers tools to ensure that one can easily integrate AI in their solutions on edge or cloud. I will also touch on different offerings like Imagen , Veo3 and real time AI integration.

The key takeaways is that yes anyone can build stuff , but how do you leverage Google technology to build meaningful stuff. And what tools fit which scenario? Also what to consider (Risks around different tools ).

sessions.title: Tech Communities for career growth
sessions.description: A call to action that is asking for involvement from attendees in tech events. This will share my journey from volunteering for GDSC to eventually leading it and graduating into GDG. I will also share how being active in tech has opened doors for me on both a personal and professional level.

sessions.title: Easy as A, B, See : Integrating Gemini Pro model to Python for Computer Vision
sessions.description: It used to take years of learning to build computer vision applications but AI makes it simple. In less than 30 minutes I will build a CCTV system that is manned by AI to show how AI makes it easy to build and implement ideas. Using Python and AI Studio I will show how easy it is to utilize Gemini and share a few tips on building using Gemini.
